case_title: SOPHIE LAU VS. NOAH BUDNICK ET AL

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-01-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:40 A.M.: THE CAUSE COMES ON THIS DAY AS REGULARLY SCHEDULED FOR TRIAL DE NOVO; BOTH SIDES ARE PRESENT, MS. SOPHIE LAU, APPELLANT APPEARING IN PROPRIA PERSONA; RESPONDENT MR. NOAH BUDNICK ALSO APPEARING IN PROPRIA PERSONA THIS MORNING. THE COURT TAKES THE BENCH; THE CLERK ADMINISTERS THE OATH TO ALL PARTIES; THE COURT THEREUPON HEARS EVIDENCE PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES AND ACCEPTS AND REVIEWS ALL DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE SUBMITTED IN THE MATTER. AFTER HEARING ALL TESTIMONY PRESENTED AND AFTER RECEIVING ALL DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE, THE COURT THEREUPON TAKES HE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.

PRO TEM JUDGE JASON JUNGREIS; CLERK: MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (Dept. 525).

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-27-2016 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-27-2016 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Nov-02-2016 Continued To Nov-21-16 At 06:30 P.M. In Dept 506
